Name: ITEMLOT_PARAM_ST

Fields.Name: Item Acquisition Flag
Fields.Description: Event flag that is set on when this ItemLot is awarded, the ItemLot will not be rolled again if the flag is on

Fields.Name: Item Accumulate Flag
Fields.Description: Flag used to store cumulative drops

Fields.Name: Item Accumulate Max
Fields.Description: The maximum amount of times this lot will add to the cumulative number

Fields.Name: Item Rarity
Fields.Description: Overwrites the default rarity

Fields.Name: Is Progress Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets the ItemLot used by 10 based on how many story progress flags are on
